Docs.summary: Represents a four-character OpenType tag as a 32-bit unsigned integer.

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, a zero tag is returned. If shorter than four characters, the remaining bytes are padded with spaces.
Docs.summary: Parses a string of up to four ASCII characters into an .
Docs.returns: An whose packed value is derived from the first four characters of .

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
